Title: Are You Destined to Deal?
Author: Jim Donovan
Notes: The definitive video on how to become (and what it takes to succeed as) a transaction adviser. Life changing.

Title: Solar Car Parks Won't Clean Up the Grid
Author: David Fickling
Notes: Owners of farmland typically would like the freedom to harvest whatever commodity is most profitable—whether rice, wheat or solar electricity.

Title: Babble and Prune
Author: alkjash
Notes: How is actionable knowledge produced from thought? Implications for language, [creativity](https://theoatmeal.com/comics/making_things), and artificial intelligence.
